rows.label: qev011002_MSG0005
rows.name:
...I see. So it was... too
late after all.........[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011002_MSG0006
rows.name:
Law's body... I'm sorry, but I'd like
you to bring him back. We want to give
him a proper burial ourselves.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011002_MSG0007
rows.name:
If possible, it would help if you
brought back his belongings as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011002_MSG0008
rows.name:
I'm so sorry for relying on you
for everything... But please do
this, for Law's sake as well.[ST:wait ]
